diagrams.title: Safe Malware Analysis Lab Network Architecture

nodes.label:
Host Machine (Standard User)
- Hypervisor
- AV Installed

Analysis VM #1
(No Internet)
- Tools Running
- Malware Executing

edges.label:
Internet Access for

diagrams.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Safe Malware Handling Practices</text>
  
  <!-- Isolation Container -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="220" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Isolated Environment
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Malware Sample -->
  <circle cx="120" y="150" r="30" fill="#F44336" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="120" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Malware
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Analysis Tools -->
  <rect x="180" y="120" width="60" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Analysis
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Protection Shield -->
  <path d="M300,150 Q330,120 360,150 Q330,180 300,150 Z" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="330" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Protection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connection Lines -->
  <line x1="150" y1="150" x2="180" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="240" y1="150" x2="300" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Best Practices Labels -->
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Key Practices:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Use isolated environments
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Employ proper analysis tools
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="310" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Implement protection measures
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
